title: [YTP] How Spider-Link lost his Nintendo 64 (*wheeze*)
description:
Originally posted on: November 30, 2007

Old description:
One could say: "It's not exactly a YouTube poop". I say: "So this is my first not-exactly-YouTube poop!"

Well, it all started, when Link got a brand new Nintendo 64 with a Spider-man game. However, something gone wrong and he turned into Spider-Link!

Meanwhile, Mama Luigi is destroying everything with its *wheeze*. Can Spider-Link save the King of Hyrule? Will he ever play the Nintendo 64 again?

Find out in THIS episode. No "to be continued", I swear.

Honors:

#90 - Top Favorites (This Week) - Comedy - Poland
#97 - Top Rated (Today) - Comedy - Poland
